arts.ttl: Arsenal make statement in Spurs win but Ange Postecoglou hasn't learned his lesson
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM HOTSPUR 0-1 ARSENAL: Gabriel Magalhaes' second half header clinched it for Arsenal, who move up to second place in the table, two points behind Man City ahead of their title clash next week

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's big Arsenal hope came true in North London derby as boss hails Spurs win
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta was dealing with a depleted squad as Arsenal travelled to Spurs for the North London derby but Gabriel Magalhaes' goal was enough to give them all three points

arts.ttl: Hits and misses: Arsenal's biggest strength still a major Spurs weakness
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes's header, powered home from inside the Spurs six-yard box from Bukayo Saka's inswinging delivery, was the 24th set-piece goal Arsenal have scored in the Premier League since the start of last season, the most by any side in the division. Please use Chrome browser for a more accessible video player

arts.ttl: No Rice, no Ødegaard, no problem: Arsenal top Spurs in derby
arts.sum: Arsenal were without their first-choice midfield in the North London derby, but that didn't stop them from taking all three points.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea join race for Championship wonderkid
arts.sum: Sidibe made his senior debut for the Potters against Rotherham in August 2023 and he became the club’s third youngest player of all time at just 16 years and 176 days old in the process. Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly among the clubs interested in signing Stoke City midfielder Souleymane Sidibe .

arts.ttl: Jarred Gillett actually made a big mistake in Tottenham 0-1 Arsenal that nobody is talking about - opinion
Pundits claim Arsenal’s winning derby goal should not have been allowed
arts.sum: Gabriel rose above the defender to power home a header in the 64th minute, but there was discussion over whether the goal should have stood

arts.ttl: Ange on set-pieces: It's my burden to carry | 'It's Spurs' kryptonite'
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou said Tottenham's set-piece defending was his "burden to carry" as Jamie Redknapp called it Spurs' "kryptonite".

arts.ttl: Gabriel's winning goal for Arsenal in north London derby should NOT have stood, claim Paul Merson and Les Ferdinand
arts.sum: Gabriel's second half header proved to be the difference in the north London derby, with the Brazilian leaping highest from Bukayo Saka's inswinging corner.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Arsenal highlights as Gabriel goal wins North London Derby for Mikel Arteta's side
arts.sum: Alan Shearer believes it could be a very tight North London Derby. The North London Derby is a huge one in the Premier League.
